name: jd
description: Graph-RAG JD generator backed by Neo4j + Groq. Produces a job description with evidence panel and a rejection-feedback loop. Coexists with the simpler agents/recruit/jd_gen.py.

capabilities.name: generate_jd
capabilities.description: Generate a JD via graph-RAG over the employee graph. Streams tool-call progress over SSE.

capabilities.name: reject_jd
capabilities.description: Persist a recruiter rejection. Free-text reasons are classified into a 7-item taxonomy.

capabilities.name: approve_jd
capabilities.description: Mark a draft JD as approved.

capabilities.name: dump_graph
capabilities.description: D3-shaped JSON dump of the JD graph for visualization.

capabilities.name: upload_graph
capabilities.description: Replace or augment the JD graph from a JSON or CSV-zip-bundle upload.
